note: v0.6.2 state anti-parallel jog de-cramp: a single gated post-pass separateAntiParallelJogs runs inside finishEdges right after separateLanes and staggers a genuine collinear A->B/B->A elbow pair's jogs >= JOG_GAP (26) apart, each biased toward its own target (via the existing moveLane). computePerimeterPorts + routeElbow are UNCHANGED; elbow-only + gated (|Δalong| < 1), so every clean edge and all curved/fancy geometry stay byte-identical. Mirrored byte-for-byte in the vnmRuntime twin at both call sites (renderEdges + buildSvg), guarded by dom-runtime-parity. The state diagram's fail/retry now read as two clearly-separated arrows. before/ holds the as-is baseline (both jogs collinear at y=306, merged crossbar) for side-by-side compare.

diagrams.title: state-antiparallel-decramp: As-built - separateAntiParallelJogs() staggers a collinear anti-parallel pair's jogs in finishEdges (gated, elbow-only), mirrored in the runtime twin
